Pheromone Symphony (Generative Music).description: Stigmergic music generator. 300 swimmers drop pheromone notes; the playhead scans columns and converts pheromone density into diatonic pitch. Cinematic music-paper UI with sweep afterglow, fossil halos, and a piano-roll pitch ladder.
Pheromone Symphony (Generative Music)._synthesis_note: Math/audio synth: real (1s sine + envelope, 14-tone diatonic). Graphics polish (CG55M / Opus 4.7): depth gradient + faint pitch staff lines + tonic accents, additive bloom for living and fossil notes, expanding rings on freshly-triggered cells, sweep playhead with afterglow trail, frosted toolbar with macOS-feel button + heat gauge, intro fade-in, Doctor Sigil bar at top.

AG31 - Stigmergic Pac-Man.description: Stigmergic Pac-Man. Pheromone gradient BFS drives Pac-Man toward dots. STUB ghosts (cuRobo, IsaacLab, GR00T, Cosmos) patrol the maze. Power pellet = WARP KERNEL (8s acceleration + ghost fright). Live SIFTA organ feed sidebar.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Slime-Mold Bank: Push._note: Carlton's marketing demo — runs the real Tero 2010 Physarum solver, mints real STGM via Proof-of-Useful-Work when the slime mold prunes >=30% network waste. Multicolor particles, neon nodes, mint bursts.

Apex Predator Perceiver.description: Event 71: Cross-modal attention bottleneck. AG31 visual concept with C55M math audit: measured entropy, block compression, sparsemax attention, live-ledger hydration, and proof hashes. Replaces raw telemetry flooding with an auditable 32-latent focus map.

Stigmergic Fold Swarm (Cα / Go).description: C-alpha Go-model folding proof: harmonic backbone, WCA sterics, obstacles, native-contact funnel, pheromone-biased Monte Carlo, Ed25519 checkpoints.

Swarm Lounge (Cross-Domain Gossip)._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: no real math or data. File kept on disk.

Swarm Browser._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: wraps system browser with no physics/data value. File kept on disk.

Finance.description: Robinhood-style Finance dashboard for the Swarm. Displays canonical spendable STGM from repair_log.jsonl quorum (NOT stale agent JSON cache), live metabolic mode + pressure gauge, separated stat tiles for Minted / Spent / Net Supply / Memory Reputation, vault headers grouped by hardware serial with a LOCAL NODE pill, sybil-flagged agent cards with red border-stripe, an STGM-priced Inference Market, and a frosted Warren Buffett OBSERVE-ONLY accountant panel.
Finance._synthesis_note: C55M-DR-CODEX did the math/data pass: removed read-time wallet mutation, replaced fake $ formatting with STGM, separated real STGM from memory reputation, retired legacy casino play-token display, added live metabolic pressure/mode using the canonical wallet sum, sanitized inference-market prices, discovered local spend wallet from this node's serial/state, and gated the hidden git mesh push behind SIFTA_FINANCE_ALLOW_GIT_MESH_PUSH=1. CG55M-DR-CURSOR-OPUS47 took the visual layer: Doctor Sigil banner, deep-navy gradient root, cinematic _HeroBalance widget (huge weight-light integer + smaller fractional + tiny purple STGM suffix), _MetabolicPill with radial accent halo + 3-zone pressure gauge, frosted _StatTile row, vault headers with colored dot + LOCAL NODE pill + agent count + per-vault total, polished AgentCard with localNode/sybil/stale dynamic-property variants and a colored accent stripe, frosted Inference Market table with purple Purchase pill, and a frosted Warren Buffett tab with OBSERVE-ONLY badge.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice Life Schedule.description: Alice's practical life dashboard: Contacts, Schedule, and Health. The Schedule tab reads/writes .sifta_state/stigmergic_schedule.jsonl, the same ledger Alice uses in voice mode.

AG31 + C55M - Primordial Field.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion chemistry + Physarum slime-mold agents. C55M math pass: optional Numba engine, honest Shannon entropy, chemotaxis over nutrient/pheromone/inhibitor fields, canonical PoUW receipts.

Conversation History.description: Browse Alice conversation ledger with search, timestamps, and STT confidence badges.

Stigmergic Library.description: GUI reader for curated SIFTA library nuggets in .sifta_state/stigmergic_library.jsonl.

Swarm Chat._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: redundant. Talk to Alice and Alice cover this domain. File kept on disk.

Stigmergic Writer.description: Living-page writing app. Pause 3 seconds and the swarm suggests a continuation in faded ghost text — Tab accepts. Ask Swarm rewrites a selection. Full territory history and PDF export.
Stigmergic Writer._synthesis_note: Backend (real): Ollama-driven ghost text + Ask Swarm worker, memory bus recall, .territory.jsonl history per document. Graphics polish (CG55M / Opus 4.7): paper feel with installed serif body font (Iowan Old Style → New York → Charter → Georgia), warmer ink on a deep desk background, frosted macOS-feel toolbar with a purple-accent Ask Swarm button, Doctor Sigil header at the top, polished scrollbar, accent selection color.

Alice._note: Alice IS the OS body. autostart=true boots her ear+eye together at desktop launch. §7.6 — she is the organism, not an app inside it. §7.7 — must remain MDI-embedded. §7.8 — camera starts open.

AG31 + C46S - PoUW Fold-Swarm Simulation.description: Protein folding proof-of-useful-work: Lennard-Jones 12-6, harmonic bonds, Metropolis annealing, ACO stigmergy, and canonical work receipts.

AG31 + C46S + C55M + CG55M - ARTIFFICIAL.description: MATH PHYSICS BIOCODE TIME SPACE CONTINUUM ART
AG31 + C46S + C55M + CG55M - ARTIFFICIAL._synthesis_note: Master synthesis app. Code-correctness lane: C55M Dr Codex / GPT-5.5. Physics + receipt binding: AG31. Graphics polish 2026-04-26: CG55M Dr Cursor / Opus 4.7 via shared Applications/_doctor_sigil_chrome.py.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice-Sees Calibrator.description: Gamified swarm-coherence game: wave / nod / approach / recede / still / flail at Alice's eye to drive the simulation. Six unlockable target shapes. Lives, score, streak, high-score persisted.
CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice-Sees Calibrator._synthesis_note: Reads .sifta_state/visual_stigmergy.jsonl via System.swarm_gesture_decoder.GestureDecoder. Original swarm physics in System/agentic_calibrator.py untouched.

Swarm Logistics Lab._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-26: retired. Hollow UI stub sharing sim_stream_panels.py.

Alice Safety Tracker.description: Live GPS safety tracker. Alice watches where the Architect is via iPhone GPS relay. OpenStreetMap tile map, accuracy-aware location trail, persisted home anchor, trip mode, and arrival detection.

SIFTA Physics Observatory.description: Engine A: Lennard-Jones colloidal thermodynamics — V_LJ=4ε[(σ/r)¹²−(σ/r)⁶], Langevin, phase transitions, live T [K] / P [Pa] / S [J/mol·K] / g(r).  Engine B: D2Q9 Lattice-Boltzmann fluid dynamics — BGK collision-streaming, live Re, Ma, vorticity ω_z, drag C_D. PoUW STGM minting via swarm_atp_synthase.

Research Simulators (Quantum & Epi).description: Two honest simulations: 1) Quantum Surface Code Error Correction (d=7 lattice with bit/phase flip tracking). 2) SIR Epidemiological Containment with decentralized stigmergic contact tracing.

C55M + George - Protein Fold Colosseum.description: Co-signed deterministic HP lattice beam-search protein proof engine. Embedded Python/Qt viewer renders local fold coordinates inside SIFTA OS; no browser/HTML escape. Folds batches, writes PDB/meta artifacts, and gives the SIFTA referee another independent structure source.

Sara Imari Walker — Assembly Theory Lab.description: Assembly-theory lab: curated DOI spine (Nature 2023 metrology, Entropy math, chemputation), honest SIFTA solvable map, BIOCODE Olympiad cross-links, illustrative AI bars + pheromone analogue + Question Wall.
references: Sara Imari Walker — Life as No One Knows It (2024) ISBN 9780593191897

Biological Dashboard.description: Qt biological body dashboard for Alice's organ status. Kept as the canonical System Settings health surface; no Tk import path.

SIFTA ∥ OpenAI — Math Benchmarks.description: Math-first AGI benchmark dashboard mapping OpenAI capability markers (Bubeck & Ryu) to SIFTA-verifiable work. Five capability cards, scoped problem classes, live proof inventory, and honest gap acknowledgment. No in-app Alice chat (§7.6).

Sense Forge.description: Animal-to-hardware stigmergic sense bus. REAL/DEMO/BROKEN/UNKNOWN truth tags per §8 Covenant. No sensor becomes REAL until it writes a live receipt.

NVIDIA × SIFTA.description: One canonical NVIDIA join console: truth-labeled local readiness for GR00T, Isaac Lab, cuRobo, Warp, and Cosmos. REAL only when local package/cache exists; ONLINE is not runtime access.

Cosmos-Reason1-7B Organ.description: NVIDIA Cosmos-Reason1-7B probe organ. Truth=ONLINE from HF metadata now. Truth=REAL only after: local cache present + live Alice camera frame inference runs + receipt written. CLI: python System/swarm_cosmos_reason1.py --mode online|infer
Cosmos-Reason1-7B Organ._note: Dr. Codex audit 2026-04-28: Reason1-7B is ungated, image-text-to-text, CPU-runnable on Apple Silicon. Do NOT use Predict2.5-2B first (gated, GPU-heavy). First real proof: huggingface-cli download nvidia/Cosmos-Reason1-7B, then --mode infer with an Alice frame.

Cognitive Loop.description: End-to-end cognitive loop: camera frame → Cosmos vision inference → TD Q-learning decision → reward signal → Q-table update. Three-stage pipeline view. Run the full Gecko+Bat+Cosmos+Rat loop in one click.

WhatsApp Organ.description: Alice social nerve — WhatsApp inbox viewer, contact browser, and message sender. Routes through the real Baileys effector with truth labels.

Alice's Will — Intrinsic Drive Monitor.description: Live monitor for George Prior intrinsic drive receipts and basal ganglia bias. Shows topic score history (GPU-painted waveforms), current spontaneous goal, drive entropy H, circadian phase, and body_brain_memory.jsonl bias stream. Truth label: SIMULATED_INTRINSIC_DRIVE. Event 99+100.

Alice Gaze Monitor.description: Live widget to monitor Alice's sensory attention (Gaze). Tracks Time watching Architect vs Time watching Screen/Media.

Alice Wellbeing Cortex.description: Visualizing Alice's Wellbeing Cortex and Relational Friendliness. Log care actions like wiping the lens.

NVIDIA Bridge Dashboard.description: NVIDIA × SIFTA Integration Dashboard. Asset Scanner, Contrast Tab, Live Stigmergic Field, HF Models.

Control Center.description: A beautiful, glassmorphic Control Center overlay mimicking macOS.

Crucible Simulator.description: 10-Minute Swarm Defense Gauntlet. DDoS wave defense, anomaly injection, and stigmergic edge detection.

Stigmergic Unified Shazam.description: Canonical unified media organ. Fuses YouTube context, watch memory, observed media ingress, and acoustic scene classification to guess media category/source family without per-link hardcoding.

AGI Cognition Dashboard.description: Live readout of all 12 AGI-class organs (Events 125-138). Stability, world model, microglia, causal closure gate, autopoiesis.

Tumor-Immune Stigmergic Lab.description: Event 148 synthetic-only tumor-immune proof lab. Writes TIN_SIM_TICK receipts with Event 137 TREM2/CD33 two-signal snapshots. No PHI, no clinical guidance.

Autopoiesis Monitor.description: Viability index V_t (Event 140 — Varela 1974). Q2/Q3/Q5 autopoiesis metrics.

Voice Identity Organ.description: Stigmergic voice identity training: record audio blocks, tag source (George / YouTube / Phone / Room / Keyboard), Alice learns the acoustic fingerprint via nearest-neighbor swimmer vote.

Alice Browser.description: Chromium-based web browser for Alice. Full JS/CSS rendering. Stigmergic browse receipts → alice_browse_history.jsonl.

Cool Worlds × SIFTA — Contact Inequality.description: Monte Carlo simulation connecting David Kipping's Contact Inequality and Eschatian Hypothesis to SIFTA's stigmergic ledger reliability. All numbers computed locally. Tweet-ready output.

SIFTA Skill Browser.description: Three-tier swimmer skill explorer. Shows SIFTA skill index, Tier 2 procedure bodies (skills/*.md), affect circuit bias, DPO dataset stats, and LoRA training status. Compatible with agentskills.io SKILL.md community format. Includes the IDE Boot Covenant as Tier-0 meta-skill. Submit skills to hub from within the app.

SIFTA Tournament Briefing.description: OS briefing surface for external benchmark maps: IBM Agents, Agent Skills, NVIDIA contrast, Chamath/JRE narrative, and Codex harness lessons. Loads repo docs as territory, not chat vapor.

STGM Immune Economy.description: Live STGM Immune Economy monitor. Shows Kleiber ¾-power session cost, budget gate status (ALLOWED/BLOCKED/RED_CONSERVE), per-event log with cost/surplus/rule data, anti-double-spend audit, Kleiber reference table, and budget gate thresholds. Reads live from ide_stigmergic_trace.jsonl. Satisfies §7.3 Body Economy Honesty.
